name: Hungarian Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large sauté pan over medium heat. Add the diced onions and cook until they are translucent, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms to the pan and cook until they release their moisture and become tender, about 10-12 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In a saucepan, melt the butter over low heat. Gradually whisk in the flour to form a smooth roux. Cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Slowly add the white wine, stirring continuously until it is fully incorporated.
6. Reduce the heat to medium and gradually stir in the milk, whisking frequently until the mixture thickens, about 10-15 minutes.
7. Stir in the mushroom/onion mixture, then the sour cream and seasonings (paprika, salt, dill weed, and black pepper). Simmer over low heat for an additional 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
8. Serve hot. Yield: 8 cups.
